headline: Assessing Nordson (NDSN) Valuation After Recent Share Price Cooling And Strong One Year Returns
summary: Setting the scene for Nordson after recent moves Nordson (NDSN) has seen mixed price action recently, with a 1.5% decline in the last session, a small gain over the past week, and a negative return over the past month. See our latest analysis for Nordson. At a share price of US$263.10, Nordson’s recent 1 day and 30 day share price weakness contrasts with a 9.16% year to date share price return and a 50.95% 1 year total shareholder return. This suggests earlier momentum has cooled, but longer...
